response:
TEMPERATURE RISES AS SUN SHINES BRIGHT.
HOT SAND BURNS FEET OF WALKING SOTS.
SWEAT SOAKS SKIN OF SWEATING SOTS.
SUN SHINES STRONG ON STONY SOIL.
SAND SHIFTS SLOWLY IN SUMMER WINDS.
SUNSETS SHOW STARS IN SKY SOON.
STARS SHINE BRIGHT IN SUMMER NIGHTS.
SILVER MOON SHINES OVER SLEEPING SOTS.
SILENT SOTS SLEEP IN SANDY DUNES.
SUN RISES AGAIN IN SUMMER SKY.
SUN SHINES ON SWEATING SOTS NOW.
ROLL THE SOTS IN SANDY SOIL.
SUN SETS SLOWLY OVER SLEEPING SOTS.
